name: blindspot
description: BlindSpot - Android Xposed Module for App Hardening

scripts.android:build: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android assembleDebug"
scripts.android:build:release: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android assembleRelease"
scripts.android:install: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android installDebug"
scripts.android:run: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android installDebug; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & adb shell am start -n com.hardening.blindspot/.MainActivity"
scripts.android:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android clean"
scripts.android:release:apk: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$gradle = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE'\.gradle\wrapper\dists' -Recurse -Filter gradle.bat | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $gradle) { throw 'No cached Gradle found. Build any gradle project once or add gradlew wrapper files.' }; & $gradle -p android assembleRelease; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Path 'android\app\release\blindspot.apk' -Destination 'blindspot-release.apk' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.adb:logcat: adb logcat -s BLINDSPOT_LOADER:* BLINDSPOT:* BLINDSPOT_FB:* BLINDSPOT_X:* BLINDSPOT_EDGE:* BLINDSPOT_MORPHE:*
